TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Lan Tafiti ising == Lan Tafiti ising (Inkiris: David Landsborough, 1870 miheca 8 folad 2 romi'ad-1957 miheca 10 folad 14 romi'asd), mato'asay La ising, o nai Scotland ising ato Inkiris Ciwlo kawkay a lintosi, o cecay no patirengay to Canghua Kristokiw isingan. Halafin ko aro' itini i Canghua sa'etal mipaising, ira ko sowal no itiniay tamdamdaw: "Timolan ira ko Mazukong, eatipan ira ci Lan ising". O wawa ci Lan Taypi . Kasofocan I 1870 miheca 8 folad 2 romi'ad , masofoc ci Lan Tafiti i Scotland no nikapolongan kitakit. I 1895 mihrca, misawad cingra i isingyin no Edinburgh daykako, ikor itini i Taywan 40 miheca ko isingan pilinto a tayal . Roma i, misa'icel ci Lan Tafiti palowad to itiniaty Taywan a isingan . I 1928 miheca, o cecay 13 mihecaan a kaemangay wawa ci Cou Cinyao malono' ko cefi', caay ka molengaw ko fanges, oya fafahi ni Lan Tafiti ci Lian Mayu miala to sepatay a fanges no cepi' palalinahen tayra ci Cou Cinyaoan, ikor talacowa onini a pitokad caay ka laheci, nika pakayni to no niyah a fanges ato kafana' a midipot sanga'ay sato ko kaadah I 1936 miheca, misawad ko kaitini ni Lan Tafiti i Taywan minokay tayra i Inkiris. I 1957 miheca 10 folad, matolo' i tosiya a mapatay cingra . Piharatengan Patorod ci Du Chongming ci Li Siciaoan papicoka to demak ni Lan Tafiti nai fafahi mikelac to fanges no niyah padama to pakoyocay wawa ci Cou Cinyao a demakan kimad, i Takao ising daykako pakapi i hanglo no Conghe piharatengan ising a pakafit; o sowal ni Du Chongming: "o mitiliday no Takao isingan mararid pakayra romakat tonini hanglo i, talifahal a mapacekil, ikor o aira ko matiniay faloco' no minanamay nga'ayay a malaisingay, mipatado to adadaay tamdaw." . I 2008 miheca, milesasiki ko patilidan i, o piharatengan to kaitini i Taywan ni Lan Tafiti ising a pacakat . Pinengnengan a tilid 2. (Dr. David Lands-borough,1870～1957). - 校史館. mkhs.kmu.edu.tw. (2016-12-01). ( . www.bdcconline.net. (2016-12-10). (原始內容存檔於2016-12-10).
S.PHON: == ɾan tafiti isiŋ == ɾan tafiti isiŋ (inkiris: ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ ɾanɬ~ɮsb~b~vo~uro~uo~u~u*ħ, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ-**** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡasɬ~ɮ), mato~uʡasaj ɾa isiŋ, o~u nai sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ isiŋ ato~u inkiris ʦiwɾo~u kawkaj a ɾinto~usi, o~u ʦəʦaj no~u patirəŋaj to~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŋan. ħaɾafin ko~u aro~uʡ itini i ʦaŋħo~u~ua saʡətaɾ mipaisiŋ, ira ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u itiniaj tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw: "timo~uɾan ira ko~u ma*o~u~uko~uŋ, əatipan ira ʦi ɾan isiŋ". o~u wawa ʦi ɾan tajpi . kaso~ufo~uʦan i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ , maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi ɾan tafiti i sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ no~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit. i **** miħrʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra i isiŋjin no~u əɬ~ɮinb~b~vo~u~ur*ħ ɬ~ɮajkako~u, iko~ur itini i tajwan ** miħəʦa ko~u isiŋan piɾinto~u a tajaɾ . ro~uma i, misaʡiʦəɾ ʦi ɾan tafiti paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u itiniatj tajwan a isiŋan . i **** miħəʦa, o~u ʦəʦaj ** miħəʦaan a kaəmaŋaj wawa ʦi ʦo~uo~u~u ʦinjao~u maɾo~uno~uʡ ko~u ʦəfiʡ, ʦaaj ka mo~uɾəŋaw ko~u faŋəs, o~uja fafaħi ni ɾan tafiti ʦi ɾian majo~u~u miaɾa to~u səpataj a faŋəs no~u ʦəpiʡ paɾaɾinaħən tajra ʦi ʦo~uo~u~u ʦinjao~uan, iko~ur taɾaʦo~uwa o~unini a pito~ukaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj ka ɾaħəʦi, nika pakajni to~u no~u nijaħ a faŋəs ato~u kafanaʡ a miɬ~ɮipo~ut saŋaʡaj sato~u ko~u kaaɬ~ɮaħ i **** miħəʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaitini ni ɾan tafiti i tajwan mino~ukaj tajra i inkiris. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, mato~uɾo~uʡ i to~usija a mapataj ʦiŋra . piħaratəŋan pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ʦi ɾi siʦiao~uan papiʦo~uka to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni ɾan tafiti nai fafaħi mikəɾaʦ to~u faŋəs no~u nijaħ paɬ~ɮama to~u pako~ujo~uʦaj wawa ʦi ʦo~uo~u~u ʦinjao~u a ɬ~ɮəmakan kimaɬ~ɮ, i takao~u isiŋ ɬ~ɮajkako~u pakapi i ħaŋɾo~u no~u ʦo~uŋħə piħaratəŋan isiŋ a pakafit; o~u so~uwaɾ ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ: "o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u takao~u isiŋan marariɬ~ɮ pakajra ro~umakat to~unini ħaŋɾo~u i, taɾifaħaɾ a mapaʦəkiɾ, iko~ur o~u aira ko~u matiniaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u minanamaj ŋaʡajaj a maɾaisiŋaj, mipataɬ~ɮo~u to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw." . i **** miħəʦa, miɾəsasiki ko~u patiɾiɬ~ɮan i, o~u piħaratəŋan to~u kaitini i tajwan ni ɾan tafiti isiŋ a paʦakat . pinəŋnəŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. (ɬ~ɮr. ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ ɾanɬ~ɮs-b~b~vo~uro~uo~u~u*ħ,*********). - ***. mkħs.kmo~u~u.əɬ~ɮo~u~u.tw. (****-**-**). ( . www.b~b~vɬ~ɮʦʦo~unɾinə.nət. (****-**-**). (***********-**-**).
S.FORM: == Lan Tafiti ising == Lan Tafiti ising (Inkiris: David Landsborough, 1870 miheca 8 folad 2 romi'ad-1957 miheca 10 folad 14 romi'asd), mato'asay La ising, o nai Scotland ising ato Inkiris Ciwlo kawkay a lintosi, o cecay no patirengay to Canghua Kristokiw isingan. Halafin ko aro' itini i Canghua sa'etal mipaising, ira ko sowal no itiniay tamdamdaw: "Timolan ira ko Mazukong, eatipan ira ci Lan ising". O wawa ci Lan Taypi . Kasofocan I 1870 miheca 8 folad 2 romi'ad , masofoc ci Lan Tafiti i Scotland no nikapolongan kitakit. I 1895 mihrca, misawad cingra i isingyin no Edinburgh daykako, ikor itini i Taywan 40 miheca ko isingan pilinto a tayal . Roma i, misa'icel ci Lan Tafiti palowad to itiniaty Taywan a isingan . I 1928 miheca, o cecay 13 mihecaan a kaemangay wawa ci Cou Cinyao malono' ko cefi', caay ka molengaw ko fanges, oya fafahi ni Lan Tafiti ci Lian Mayu miala to sepatay a fanges no cepi' palalinahen tayra ci Cou Cinyaoan, ikor talacowa onini a pitokad caay ka laheci, nika pakayni to no niyah a fanges ato kafana' a midipot sanga'ay sato ko kaadah I 1936 miheca, misawad ko kaitini ni Lan Tafiti i Taywan minokay tayra i Inkiris. I 1957 miheca 10 folad, matolo' i tosiya a mapatay cingra . Piharatengan Patorod ci Du Chongming ci Li Siciaoan papicoka to demak ni Lan Tafiti nai fafahi mikelac to fanges no niyah padama to pakoyocay wawa ci Cou Cinyao a demakan kimad, i Takao ising daykako pakapi i hanglo no Conghe piharatengan ising a pakafit; o sowal ni Du Chongming: "o mitiliday no Takao isingan mararid pakayra romakat tonini hanglo i, talifahal a mapacekil, ikor o aira ko matiniay faloco' no minanamay nga'ayay a malaisingay, mipatado to adadaay tamdaw." . I 2008 miheca, milesasiki ko patilidan i, o piharatengan to kaitini i Taywan ni Lan Tafiti ising a pacakat . Pinengnengan a tilid 2. (Dr. David Lands-borough,1870～1957). - 校史館. mkhs.kmu.edu.tw. (2016-12-01). ( . www.bdcconline.net. (2016-12-10). (原始內容存檔於2016-12-10).
S.PHON: == ɾan tafiti isiŋ == ɾan tafiti isiŋ (inkiris: ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ ɾanɬ~ɮsb~b~vo~uro~uo~u~u*ħ, **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ-**** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡasɬ~ɮ), mato~uʡasaj ɾa isiŋ, o~u nai sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ isiŋ ato~u inkiris ʦiwɾo~u kawkaj a ɾinto~usi, o~u ʦəʦaj no~u patirəŋaj to~u ʦaŋħo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŋan. ħaɾafin ko~u aro~uʡ itini i ʦaŋħo~u~ua saʡətaɾ mipaisiŋ, ira ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u itiniaj tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw: "timo~uɾan ira ko~u ma*o~u~uko~uŋ, əatipan ira ʦi ɾan isiŋ". o~u wawa ʦi ɾan tajpi . kaso~ufo~uʦan i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ , maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi ɾan tafiti i sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ no~u nikapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit. i **** miħrʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra i isiŋjin no~u əɬ~ɮinb~b~vo~u~ur*ħ ɬ~ɮajkako~u, iko~ur itini i tajwan ** miħəʦa ko~u isiŋan piɾinto~u a tajaɾ . ro~uma i, misaʡiʦəɾ ʦi ɾan tafiti paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u itiniatj tajwan a isiŋan . i **** miħəʦa, o~u ʦəʦaj ** miħəʦaan a kaəmaŋaj wawa ʦi ʦo~uo~u~u ʦinjao~u maɾo~uno~uʡ ko~u ʦəfiʡ, ʦaaj ka mo~uɾəŋaw ko~u faŋəs, o~uja fafaħi ni ɾan tafiti ʦi ɾian majo~u~u miaɾa to~u səpataj a faŋəs no~u ʦəpiʡ paɾaɾinaħən tajra ʦi ʦo~uo~u~u ʦinjao~uan, iko~ur taɾaʦo~uwa o~unini a pito~ukaɬ~ɮ ʦaaj ka ɾaħəʦi, nika pakajni to~u no~u nijaħ a faŋəs ato~u kafanaʡ a miɬ~ɮipo~ut saŋaʡaj sato~u ko~u kaaɬ~ɮaħ i **** miħəʦa, misawaɬ~ɮ ko~u kaitini ni ɾan tafiti i tajwan mino~ukaj tajra i inkiris. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, mato~uɾo~uʡ i to~usija a mapataj ʦiŋra . piħaratəŋan pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ ʦi ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ ʦi ɾi siʦiao~uan papiʦo~uka to~u ɬ~ɮəmak ni ɾan tafiti nai fafaħi mikəɾaʦ to~u faŋəs no~u nijaħ paɬ~ɮama to~u pako~ujo~uʦaj wawa ʦi ʦo~uo~u~u ʦinjao~u a ɬ~ɮəmakan kimaɬ~ɮ, i takao~u isiŋ ɬ~ɮajkako~u pakapi i ħaŋɾo~u no~u ʦo~uŋħə piħaratəŋan isiŋ a pakafit; o~u so~uwaɾ ni ɬ~ɮo~u~u ʦħo~uŋmiŋ: "o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u takao~u isiŋan marariɬ~ɮ pakajra ro~umakat to~unini ħaŋɾo~u i, taɾifaħaɾ a mapaʦəkiɾ, iko~ur o~u aira ko~u matiniaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ no~u minanamaj ŋaʡajaj a maɾaisiŋaj, mipataɬ~ɮo~u to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj tamɬ~ɮaw." . i **** miħəʦa, miɾəsasiki ko~u patiɾiɬ~ɮan i, o~u piħaratəŋan to~u kaitini i tajwan ni ɾan tafiti isiŋ a paʦakat . pinəŋnəŋan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. (ɬ~ɮr. ɬ~ɮab~viɬ~ɮ ɾanɬ~ɮs-b~b~vo~uro~uo~u~u*ħ,*********). - ***. mkħs.kmo~u~u.əɬ~ɮo~u~u.tw. (****-**-**). ( . www.b~b~vɬ~ɮʦʦo~unɾinə.nət. (****-**-**). (***********-**-**).
